creator: o.kryvulia@flex-it.com.ua
text:
After upgrading nagios4 to 4.5.0,1 version nagios process crashes when writing to mk-livestatus socket.

Steps to reproduce:

# service nagios start
# service nagios status
nagios is running as pid 59027
# echo 'GET hosts' | nc -U -N /var/spool/nagios/rw/mklivestatus
# service nagios status
nagios is not running.

There are no any problems with nagios4-4.4.13_1,1

P.S. Seems it is an upstream bug https://github.com/NagiosEnterprises/nagioscore/issues/943
